---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for CRUX
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Use case**
What problem are you trying to solve? Describe the scenario — the
maintainers will help find the best architectural fit.

**Proposed solution**
How you'd like this to work (brief, high-level).

**Alternatives considered**
Any workarounds or different approaches you've thought about.

**Additional context**
Links to related issues, relevant parts of the codebase, or external
references.
